questions.question:
A Deployment named `secure-api` in namespace `securitycontext-lab` is failing because its security context is wrong.

Fix the workload so that:
- the pod security context uses `runAsUser: 1000`
- the pod security context uses `fsGroup: 2000`
- the container seccomp profile is `RuntimeDefault`
- the container sets `allowPrivilegeEscalation: false`
- the container drops capability `ALL`
- the volume remains mounted at `/data`
- the Deployment becomes Available
- the running container writes `/data/secure.txt` as UID `1000`

Do not replace the Pod with a different workload kind. Repair the Deployment securityContext in place.

verification.description: Deployment secure-api uses the intended pod and container securityContext settings
Deployment secure-api becomes Available after the securityContext repair
The running container uses UID 1000 and writes the expected file under /data
